value.name: 1id Initiative
value.description: Alignment with 1id Initiative

value.name: Activity
value.description: Type of work involved

value.name: Analysis
value.description: The analysis of the issue including root cause identification and potential solutions

value.name: Application Launch Instructions
value.description: Instructions to launch the specified application

value.name: Application Start Information
value.description: The path to execute the application

value.name: Application Type
value.description: The type of application on which to give feedback

value.name: Area Path
value.description: The area of the product with which this bug is associated

value.name: Assigned To
value.description: The person currently working on this bug

value.name: Automated Test Id
value.description: The ID of the test that automates this test case

value.name: Automated Test Name
value.description: The name of the test that automates this test case

value.name: Automated Test Storage
value.description: The assembly containing the test that automates this test case

value.name: Automated Test Type
value.description: The type of the test that automates this test case

value.name: Behavior Change
value.description: Used to identify which the work item requires documentation updates or customer communication

value.name: Business Outcome
value.description: Justification on why performing this work is valuable to the business.

value.name: Business Value
value.description: The business value for the customer when the epic is released

value.name: CAB Approved PAR
value.description: Use for Pre-Approved CAB work items

value.name: Called By
value.description: The person who called the review

value.name: Called Date
value.description: The date and time the review was called

value.name: Comments
value.description: Comments for the review

value.name: Committed
value.description: Has the requirement been committed?

value.name: Completed Work
value.description: The number of units of work that have been spent on this bug

value.name: CPD Brief
value.description: Short narrative summary of Customer Problem Statement with link to CPD document.

value.name: CPD Link
value.description: Direct link to Customer Problem Statement URL

value.name: CR #
value.description: Should be input for Escalated work items

value.name: Current Quarter
value.description: Current fiscal year (FY) quarter for commit delivery

value.name: Current Year
value.description: Current fiscal year (FY) commitment delivery is planned for

value.name: Customer Problem Definition
value.description: Define the specific type of customer you are addressing. This could include their role, goals, or other relevant characteristics.

value.name: Demo Video
value.description: URL of the demo video for the support training or "N/A" if there is nothing to demo.

value.name: Description
value.description: Description or acceptance criteria for this epic to be considered complete

value.name: DGETestDuration
value.description: Estimate time in hours to manually run this test (e.g. 1.25)

value.name: Discipline
value.description: The discipline to which the bug belongs

value.name: Due Date
value.description: The date by which this issue needs to be closed

value.name: Effort
value.description: The estimated effort to implemented the epic

value.name: Escalate
value.description: Used to flag an issue as critical

value.name: Escalation Date
value.description: The date when the issue was escalated

value.name: External Reference Id
value.description: Reference External IDs such as those for JIRA

value.name: Finish Date
value.description: The date to finish the task

value.name: Fixed Version
value.description: Semantic version of various Microservices are bundled under a Fixed version e.g. 2025.2 (2nd release of 2025)

value.name: Found In
value.description: The build in which the bug was found

value.name: History
value.description: Discussion thread plus automatic record of changes

value.name: Integration Build
value.description: The build in which the bug was fixed

value.name: IsArchived
value.description: Toggle for old work items, particularly for Jira to ADO migration

value.name: IsBlocked
value.description: Use this to identify that the work is blocked

value.name: IsCommitted
value.description: Has this item been committed to an FY quarter?

value.name: Issue
value.description: Used to highlight the shared step, e.g., to mark it as an issue

value.name: Iteration Path
value.description: The iteration within which this bug will be fixed

value.name: LoKI Reason
value.description: Publication LoKI Reason

value.name: LoU Description
value.description: Click here to add description as you want it to appear in List of Updates

value.name: LoU Draft
value.description: Click to add draft as you want it appear in List of Updates

value.name: LoU Reason
value.description: Publication List Of Updates Reason

value.name: LoU State
value.description: Publication List Of Updates State

value.name: MainWorkItemId
value.description: ID of the main work item

value.name: Meeting Type
value.description: The type of the review meeting

value.name: Minutes
value.description: The minutes of the review meeting

value.name: Mitigation Triggers
value.description: The mitigation triggers

value.name: MOP
value.description: A MOP is Different from a Runbook, Procedure, or Best Practices, a MOP is a granular and detailed schedule. The MOP, or Method of Procedure is specific to the individuals taking action, the changes being released, and the timing of the changes.

value.name: MyBugOrigin
value.description: Enter Bug Origin

value.name: MySubFeature
value.description: Sub Feature based on selected Feature

value.name: MyTechArea
value.description: HSM Encryption

value.name: Original Estimate
value.description: Initial value for Remaining Work - set once, when work begins

value.name: Original Quarter
value.description: Original fiscal year (FY) quarter the commitment was made against

value.name: Original Year
value.description: Original Fiscal Year (FY) the commit was set for

value.name: PAM_Appliance_TechArea
value.description: HSM

value.name: PAM_Feature_Team
value.description: Development teamoOwning this feature

value.name: Priority
value.description: Business importance. 1=must fix; 4=unimportant.

value.name: Probability
value.description: A percentage indicating the estimated likelihood that the risk will occur

value.name: Progress
value.description: Progress for Aha integrations.

value.name: Public Description
value.description: Public description text written by the developers, reviewed and processed by the technical communications team.

value.name: Public State
value.description: No: won't be published.Yes: will be published.Documented: handled by the TechWriter team.

value.name: Purpose
value.description: The purpose of the review

value.name: QA Test Results
value.description: Summary of the testing performed which certify that the changes being made are stable and ready for release.

value.name: Rating
value.description: Overall rating provided as part of feedback response

value.name: Reason
value.description: The reason why the bug is in the current state

value.name: ReflectedWorkItemId
value.description: Field to be used with the VSTS Sync Migrator

value.name: Release Notes Text
value.description: Description template for release notes

value.name: Remaining Work
value.description: An estimate of the number of units of work remaining to complete this bug

value.name: Repro Steps
value.description: How to see the bug. End by contrasting expected with actual behavior.

value.name: Request Type
value.description: Use this field to identify what type of request this is.

value.name: Resolved Reason
value.description: The reason why the bug was resolved

value.name: Risk
value.description: Uncertainty in epic

value.name: Secondary Contact
value.description: Use this field to identify an additional person responsible for coordination, testing, or support. This contact will not receive work item assignments automatically.

value.name: Severity
value.description: Assessment of the effect of the bug on the project

value.name: SG_Work_Category
value.description: Development Work Category

value.name: Siebel SRs
value.description: Associated Siebel Service Request number. Multiple SRs can be separated by comma.

value.name: Size
value.description: The size of work estimated for fixing the bug

value.name: Stack Rank
value.description: Work first on items with lower-valued stack rank. Set in triage.

value.name: Stakeholders
value.description: List of stakeholders

value.name: Start Date
value.description: The date to start the task

value.name: State
value.description: New = for triage; Active = not yet fixed; Resolved = fixed not yet verified; Closed = fix verified.

value.name: Steps
value.description: Steps required to perform the test

value.name: Story Points
value.description: The size of work estimated for fixing the bug

value.name: System Info
value.description: Test context, provided automatically by test infrastructure

value.name: Target Date
value.description: The target date for completing the epic

value.name: Tech Writer
value.description: Assign the technical writer responsible for documenting this work item

value.name: Test Suite Audit
value.description: Captures the test suite audit trail.

value.name: Test Suite Type
value.description: Specifies the category of the test suite.

value.name: Time Criticality
value.description: How does the business value decay over time. Higher values make the epic more time critical

value.name: Title
value.description: Stories affected and how

value.name: Triage
value.description: Status of triaging the bug

value.name: Type
value.description: Type of Integration

value.name: Validation Test Plan
value.description: Summary of the testing performed which certify that the changes being made are stable and ready for release.

value.name: Value Area
value.description: The type should be set to Business primarily to represent customer-facing issues. Work to change the architecture should be added as a User Story
